products.title: Procurement Autopilot
products.description: Independent restaurants lose 2-3 hours/day texting 5-15 suppliers across WhatsApp, phone, SMS. Nothing gets tracked, prices drift, invoices don't match orders. Procurement Autopilot parses every supplier message into orders, deliveries, invoices, and price-change alerts — suppliers never change anything.
products.subject_line: Your supplier WhatsApp threads, finally tracked.
wins: Daily pain = daily use = low churn
products.why_works: Walk into any independent restaurant at 7 AM — the manager has a notebook open, texting suppliers one by one. That's the addressable market, in plain sight.

products.title: ClientPortal
products.tagline: Auto-Generated Client Portals for B2B SMBs
products.description: Small B2B agencies and consultancies waste 3-5 hrs/week retyping status updates already sent. Clients feeling out of the loop walk to competitors. Branded Client Portal scrapes their site, auto-generates a portal pre-styled to their brand, ships them a demo URL — one-click publish to clients.theirdomain.com.
flow: Scrape SMB Site for Brand Kit
products.subject_line: Your clients are asking 'where are we?' — here's their portal.
wins: Bigger PSA tools out of price range
before_bullets: Clients feel out of the loop
products.why_works: Most alternatives require hours of setup before the buyer sees anything. We send the portal pre-built in their colors — they click and see what their first client would see.

products.title: SalonGBP
products.tagline: Vertical-Native GBP Manager for Salons & Barbershops
products.description: Independent salons have stale GBPs — no posts in 8 months, unanswered customer questions, missing prices. Newer competitors two streets over post weekly and win every 'haircut near me' search. Auto-generates a 30-day refresh: 4 weekly posts, drafted answers, priced services, curated photos. One-click manager-invite, live within an hour.
products.subject_line: Your competitors post weekly. Yours hasn't in 8 months.
before_bullets: Last photo over a year old
products.why_works: Search 'hair salon near me' in any city — most listings haven't posted in months, are missing prices, and have unanswered questions. That gap is the market.
